forecast-period.text: Mostly sunny. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Sunny. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the early morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Sunny. Patches of morning frost south of Keith. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Sunny. Patches of morning frost. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sunny. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then turning east to southeasterly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then turning east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 28 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning easterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny day. The chance of a thunderstorm near the west coast in the evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sunny. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the morning. Sunny day. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 32.

Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeasterly during the afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 32.
